findings.problem: Once the tile and damp subsoil are found, the chapter keeps rephrasing the same thematic conclusion about man-made damage and Ezra's compromised legacy. The discovery is materially strong, but the back third explains its meaning in multiple summary passes instead of converting that proof into a fresher complication or sharper consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Choose one decisive interpretive beat after the reveal at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:193 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:341, then tighten or replace the summary-heavy paragraphs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:265, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:331, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:347 so they introduce new pressure: what Dell can tell Cora, what proof must be protected, or where Dell and Hester still disagree.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after the proof lands in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:173 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:203, each later paragraph adds a distinct new development rather than another paraphrase of the same moral conclusion, and no more than one explicit summary statement about deliberate land damage / Ezra's broken legacy remains among snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:265, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:331, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:341, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:347. Fail if two or more of those late beats still restate the same thesis without changing the stakes.

findings.problem: Hester's late-chapter dialogue drifts from her style-bible register of anecdotal, plainspoken bluntness into polished authorial aphorism. These lines sound closer to thematic thesis delivery than to a working baker who usually lands truth through bodily fact, weather, labor, or memory.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the abstract verdict lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:279, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:317, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:329, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:339 so at least two of them speak through Hester's lived materials: lungs, dough, Otto's surveying, field scars, or remembered town habit. Keep the pressure, but roughen the syntax and make her point through something she can point to, remember, or physically compare.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the closing Hester exchange contains no back-to-back abstract wisdom lines and at least two of the targeted lines are rewritten into concrete, character-specific speech anchored in work, body, weather, or local memory. Fail if Hester still closes the chapter with generic quotable verdicts that could belong to the narrator or another elder character.

findings.problem: A comparative-to-abstraction sentence template becomes visible as a prose tic: 'cleaner than praise,' 'cleaner than profitable ... cleaner than afraid,' 'kinder than softness.' Used three times in one chapter, it stops feeling inevitable and starts feeling workshop-polished.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep at most one instance of this comparative-abstract template. Rewrite two of the three beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:335 into plainer or more physically specific language so the emotion comes from the situation rather than from repeated rhetorical flourish.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if only one of the targeted spans at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:335 still uses a comparative-to-abstraction formula after revision and the other two express the beat through direct physical, emotional, or situational description. Fail if two or more of those lines still hinge on '[comparative adjective] than [abstraction]' phrasing.

summary: FAIL on Booker, dialogue, and prose. The basin search is physically convincing, continuity-safe, and unsanitized, but the back third overstates the chapter's meaning after the reveal, Hester's voice slips into aphoristic theme delivery, and a repeated comparative-abstract sentence pattern becomes noticeable.
